personalInfo.name: Deepak Pai
personalInfo.currentStatus: Sr. Consultant ERP & Data Integration Architecture at Avanade/Accenture (2022–present), driving D365 analytics transformation for Rolex and Bucherer.

dataStrategy.title: D&A Strategy & Governance | Portfolio Management | Enterprise Transformation
dataStrategy.executiveSummary: Results-driven leader with 25+ years bridging technology and business — from software engineering and BI platform builds to enterprise finance transformation and D&A strategy. Electronics Engineer with MBA (St. Gallen). Proven track record architecting data governance frameworks, leading multi-million-dollar analytics programmes, and building data literacy cultures across global organisations. Comfortable operating at Board and C-level, translating complex data into strategic narratives and decisions. Currently driving ERP & Data Integration at Avanade/Accenture for Rolex and Bucherer. Certified IPMA Level C Project Manager and Agentic AI practitioner (2026).
pillars: Strategy & Portfolio Management — defining D&A roadmaps, aligning data investments with business strategy, managing multi-stakeholder portfolios
Governance & Frameworks — CMMI-L3 process governance, ISO 27001, IPMA Level C, audit-ready data frameworks
Performance Management — strategic KPI frameworks, scorecards, monthly governance/performance review cycles for C-level and Board
Vendor & Budget Management — $20M RFP leadership, CAPEX controlling ($40M p.a., 26 sites), technology alliance management (Alteryx, Workato, ERPNext)
Change & People Leadership — data literacy programme for 400+ colleagues, executive communication, organisational change management
Agentic AI & Emerging Tech — Agentic AI certified (Accenture/Avanade, 2026), ML Nanodegree (Udacity), D365 ERP integrations

D&A Strategy & Vision: Portfolio definition and D&A roadmap management
Strategic KPI frameworks and performance scorecards
D&A business case development (ROI, NPV, Monte-Carlo)
Portfolio & Programme Management: IPMA Level C Certified Project Manager
Change & Transformation: Data literacy and change management (400+ colleagues)
Stakeholder engagement across cultures and continents
Analytics & BI Technology: D365 F&O ERP analytics and integration

financeController.title: MBA, St. Gallen | D365 Finance Consultant | Financial Controller | Digital Transformation Leader
financeController.executiveSummary: Electronics Engineer with MBA from St. Gallen. Rare combination: 10 years in IT/BI building data warehouses and internet applications + 10 years in Finance & Controlling across all P&L lines ($250M+). Led strategic CAPEX decisions (US $200M). Experienced in Purchase to Pay (P2P) and Order to Cash (O2C) processes + ERP implementation. Supply Chain Controller, SG&A Controller, and M&A experience at Unilever and Ecolab. Designed global controlling frameworks and KPI reporting for C-level and senior management. Strong PowerPoint storyteller — translates complex data into executive narratives for Board, Regional GM, and C-level audiences. Implemented Spend BI tool at Unilever resulting in total transparency of savings & cash. Founded startup to digitize SME supply chains with open-source ERP — owned full B2B sales cycle, go-to-market strategy, and content marketing as CEO. International experience across 3 continents.

erp: Swiss QR invoice / EU e-invoicing EN16931

experience.position: Sr. Consultant, ERP & Data Integration Architecture
experience.description: Senior consultant driving D365 ERP analytics transformation for leading luxury brands. Architecting data integrations and finance process automation at scale.
achievements: Architected D365 F&O ERP analytics and data integration for Bucherer AG (Rolex-owned) — GL, Fixed Assets, AP, Cash & Bank Management
Delivered OCR/AI automation for 3-way match (invoice, PO, goods receipt), eliminating manual AP processing
Designed ISO 20022 treasury integration for automated bank statement reconciliation (CAMT.053)
Led AGILE/SCRUM delivery across multi-year programme with 3-week sprint cycles and global process leads
Bridge between technical D365 capabilities and finance/data business requirements for C-level stakeholders
Deep relationship management with key users and global process leads over 3+ years

experience.description: Founded boutique D&A and ERP consultancy. Built technology alliances and delivered analytics automation and finance transformation for CH/DE/AT clients.
achievements: Built Alteryx, Workato, and ERPNext technology alliances — delivering analytics automation and process integration for CH/DE/AT clients
Led NetSuite→ERPNext ERP migration: data modelling, migration scripting, finance process redesign
Implemented Swiss QR invoice compliance, EU e-invoicing EN16931, and ISO 20022 (CAMT.053) for multiple clients
Delivered analytics workflows reducing client reporting effort by 60% through Alteryx automation
Full B2B sales cycle ownership: prospecting, discovery, proposals, and closing across European SME market
Content marketing via screencasts, tutorials, and community management (Telegram, GitHub)

experience.description: Led strategic analytics programme and CAPEX governance for one of the world's largest industrial companies ($14B revenue). Reported to CFO Europe.
achievements: Led $200M analytics programme for Supply Chain Network Optimization — Monte-Carlo simulation, NPV, DCF, MIRR modelling with sensitivity analysis, presented to Board
Designed and implemented KPI/scorecard framework used by Regional GMs and Board for strategic performance management
CAPEX Controller: $40M p.a. across 26 manufacturing sites — governance, approvals, and variance tracking
Supply Chain Finance lead for M&A due diligence (RP Adam acquisition) — data room management, synergy modelling
Decision support for strategic CAPEX (US $200M) and annual CAPEX (~$30M), including Make or Buy analysis
Earned accelerated promotion — recognised as high-potential finance leader

experience.scope: USD $250M+ of COGS, 3 Manufacturing sites, 180k tons of chemicals per year
experience.description: Finance governance lead for European supply chain. Drove monthly performance review cycles with operational leadership.
achievements: Owned monthly governance and performance review cycle for $250M+ COGS (3 plants, 25% European supply) — reporting to VP Supply Chain and CFO
Developed Target Costing Data Tool automating standard cost calculations across 26 product families for Marketing, R&D, and Supply Chain
Designed variance analysis framework distinguishing price, volume, and efficiency drivers for executive reporting
Led annual budget and 5-year strategic planning process for Supply Chain Finance
Managed and developed team of 3 finance analysts across Switzerland
Finance Head for 3 plants (Annual 160k Tons, 25% of European supply) — drove high forecast accuracy using R&O framework

experience.description: Cost centre controlling and performance governance for SG&A across Swiss and European markets.
achievements: Owned cost centre reporting at local, regional, and global level for SG&A functions
Ran monthly review cycles with Regional GM and Market Leaders — risk & opportunity (R&O) framework
Designed and standardised global SG&A controlling framework and KPI reporting used by Regional GM and Market Leaders
Built automated R&O tracking framework reducing forecast cycle from 3 days to 1 day
Promoted to Supply Chain Controller based on strong performance

experience.position: Finance Manager & BI Platform Lead — Global Indirect Procurement
experience.description: Finance Manager and BI platform lead for Global Indirect Procurement at one of the world's largest FMCG companies. Built enterprise-scale analytics platform and delivered strategic finance transformation.
achievements: Architected and led delivery of enterprise Spend BI/DWH platform processing 6M global invoices annually — became #3 most-used internal tool in 12 weeks; earned CFO accolade and external Best BI award
Designed and delivered data literacy programme for 400+ procurement colleagues across 50+ countries — structured curriculum, e-learning modules, and live workshops
Led $20M IT outsourcing RFP for global procurement technology — end-to-end vendor evaluation, selection, and contract negotiation
Negotiated $3M Ariba contract renewal — multi-vendor benchmarking, TCO analysis, SLA re-structuring
Identified $16M working capital improvement through payment term corrections with 3,000+ suppliers
Led embedded FX risk initiative for procurement — new policy adopted globally by Treasury
Analyzed and proposed insourcing of Strategic Procurement for North and South Americas — $4M annual savings, 20 new FTE in Global Procurement
Promoted twice — recognised as high-potential talent
Pioneered 'democratising data' approach before term was mainstream — bridge between technical and business

experience.position: Programme Manager / BI Team Lead / Sr. Software Engineer
experience.description: Deep technical foundation across software engineering, BI platform builds, programme management, and IT governance. Progressed from software engineer to programme manager across 6 organisations on 3 continents.

aiContextInstructions.profileSelection: This resume has two profiles. Use 'dataStrategy' profile (skills, executiveSummary, pillars) for D&A, Analytics, Digital Transformation, Data Governance, Head of D&A, CDO, or AI/ML leadership roles. Use 'financeController' profile for CFO, Controller, Finance Manager, FP&A, ERP Consultant, Procurement Finance, or Supply Chain Finance roles. For hybrid roles, blend both. The experience entries cover both — pick the most relevant achievements from each entry.
aiContextInstructions.financeQuestions: Focus on: 10+ years finance experience, FP&A, SG&A/Supply Chain controlling, USD 200M CAPEX projects, P2P/O2C processes, M&A, financial modeling, procurement finance, D365 ERP consulting, cash and savings programs, business partnering at Unilever/Ecolab
aiContextInstructions.dataAnalyticsQuestions: Focus on: D&A strategy roadmaps, governance frameworks (CMMI-L3, ISO 27001), 400+ colleague data literacy programme, $200M analytics programme, Spend BI/DWH build at Unilever, USTA BI platform, Alteryx/Workato alliances, ML Nanodegree, Agentic AI 2026
aiContextInstructions.governanceQuestions: Focus on: CMMI-L3 (reduced Cost to Quality 35%→15%), ISO 27001, IPMA Level C, KPI scorecard frameworks, audit-ready data controls, R&O risk frameworks, SLA governance
aiContextInstructions.leadershipChangeQuestions: Focus on: 400+ colleague data literacy programme at Unilever, C-level/Board stakeholder engagement, $20M RFP leadership, programme management across 3 continents, team management (12 engineers at Adaequare, 3 analysts at Ecolab)
aiContextInstructions.techDataQuestions: Focus on: 25+ years SQL, BI/DWH design and build, ETL, KNIME, Alteryx, Workato, D365 integrations, ISO 20022, Agentic AI, ML/Predictive Analysis, data architecture
aiContextInstructions.erpD365Questions: Focus on: D365 F&O implementation for Rolex/Bucherer, OCR/AI AP automation, ISO 20022 treasury integration, ERP consulting expertise, ERPNext migration, Ariba, P2P/O2C process expertise, finance module deep knowledge
aiContextInstructions.supplyChainQuestions: Focus on: Supply Chain Controller role, $250M+ COGS, 3 manufacturing plants, 26 sites CAPEX governance, procurement finance at Unilever, P2P/S2C processes, supply chain network optimization $200M, target costing, M&A supply chain due diligence
aiContextInstructions.projectManagementQuestions: Focus on: IPMA Level C certified, $200M strategic analytics programme, ERP implementations (multi-year AGILE), USTA BI platform (team of 12), IT/BI for 10 manufacturing plants, CMMI-L3 process governance
